title: Kalstan gangsters
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Kalstan gangsters''' were based in the [[Xorao system/Legends|Xorao system]].

In [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]], [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]] [[Lieutenant Commander/Legends|Lieutenant Commander]] [[Anson Blazer]] was investigating their activities. The gangsters were alerted to his presence by the [[Tunroth]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]], [[Kiran Tatch]] who was visiting the system. They successfully chased off the Rebels, forcing them to leave behind much valuable equipment.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1995-06-XX -->''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''
